checked_queries: image audio video model-specific pricing missing pricing error
negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Image and video escrow/Phase 2 fee functions do not calculate from ModelInfo pricing fields or error on missing model pricing; only audio has model-specific erroring fee helpers.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-async-fees/src/lib.rs implements audio_escrow_lockup and calculate_audio_fees_phase2 with missing-pricing errors.
crates/ritual-async-fees/src/registry.rs keeps image/video ModelInfo fields zeroed/reserved and does not read image/video pricing from storage.
ritual-revm-internal image_call.rs and video_call.rs contain precompile gas-cost functions, not async escrow or Phase 2 fee accounting.

notes: Because the invariant requires image, audio, and video behavior, the audio-only implementation is insufficient.
rationale: The primary diff rewrites image, audio, and video escrow and Phase 2 fee functions to accept ModelInfo, validate modality-specific pricing fields, and return Err for missing pricing rather than falling back to uncalibrated constants. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Image, audio, and video escrow and Phase 2 fee functions calculate executor fees from ModelInfo pricing fields and return errors when the relevant model pricing is missing, instead of using stub or fallback pricing.
suggested_falsification_tests: For each image, audio, and video model, call escrow and Phase 2 fee functions with valid ModelInfo and assert the fee uses that model's modality pricing; then call with zeroed pricing fields and assert an error is returned and no fallback fee is produced.
summary: Only audio has model-specific erroring media pricing; image and video are absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: For each image, audio, and video model, call escrow and Phase 2 fee functions with valid ModelInfo and assert the fee uses that model's modality pricing; then call with zeroed pricing fields and assert an error is returned and no fallback fee is produced.
title: Multimodal pricing is model-specific and erroring
